description: National healthcare standards for the United States market. Covers ICD-10-CM diagnosis coding, CPT/HCPCS procedure coding, and X12 5010 electronic transaction standards as required by CMS and mandated under HIPAA. This is a planning-stage manifest; no implemented coding tables or transaction mappings exist yet.

dependencies.rationale: US national standards (ICD-10-CM, CPT, HCPCS, X12 5010) are mandated under the HIPAA Administrative Simplification provisions. Standards pack requires regulatory pack to define the compliance context.

configurationKeys.description: Sets ICD-10-CM as the primary diagnosis coding system for US market.
Sets CPT/HCPCS as the procedure coding system for US market.
Sets X12 5010 as the electronic transaction standard for US payer interactions.

capabilityContributions.description: US national coding and transaction standards are part of HIPAA Administrative Simplification compliance. Required for correct claim coding and electronic data interchange.
